title: VimFu — :%s/old/new/g Whole File
description: The % range means the entire file. :%s/old/new/g substitutes across every line.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

setup.content:
name = "foo"
print(name)
if name == "foo":
    greet(name)
# name is foo

steps.say: Percent S searches the entire file. It's the most common way to do find and replace.
The word foo appears on several lines. Let's rename it to bar everywhere.
Every foo in the file is now bar. The percent sign means all lines. The G flag means all occurrences per line.
Without percent, colon S only affects the current line. Percent is the key to whole file substitution.
Percent S slash old slash new slash G. Find and replace across the entire file.
